Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
Sub: Transcript of the Earnings Conference Call held on October 20, 2022 
 
In continuation to our letter dated October 18, 2022 regarding the Intimation of conference call with 
Analysts and Institutional Investors pursuant to Regulation 30 of the of SEBI (Listing Obligations and 
Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform that the virtual Earnings Call with 
Analysts/Investors on the financial results for the quarter & half year ended September 30, 2022 that was 
held on October 20, 2022 after the Board meeting of the Company, the transcript of which is available on 
the website of the Company at https://www.marketing.coforge.com/investors/transcripts 
 
You are requested to take note of the same. 
 
Thanking you, 
 
For Coforge Limited 
 
 
 
Barkha Sharma 
Company Secretary 
 
 
 
 
 
BARKHA 
SHARMA
Digitally signed by 
BARKHA SHARMA
